Our Student Muhammed Said Dağlıoğlu Passed Away

17.12.2024

We wish Allah's mercy to our undergraduate student Muhammed Said Dağlıoğlu, whose passing we learned with deep sadness.

Muhammed Said Dağlıoğlu, our 3rd year Economics Department and Management Double Major Program 1st year student, passed away from a serious illness.

The funeral of Muhammed Said Dağlıoğlu will be held on Tuesday, December 17, after the noon prayer from İsmailağa Mosque.

We wish Allah's mercy on the deceased and our condolences and patience to his family, relatives and all our members.
